creator: allanjude@FreeBSD.org
text:
Phabricator has a bot, called 'Harold', that can do things like add 'blocking reviewers' automatically.

For some example rules, portmgr has one for the Mk/ directory in ports, and secteam has a few for things like sys/crypto

I am not sure what it would take to automate the process, but it shouldn't be too difficult to convert most or all of the contents of the current file into Harold rules.
